user.title: Configure ArtNet DMX Controller
user.description: Create one DMX node by entering the target IP address and universe for your Art-Net device. Fixtures can be added afterwards from the integration options.

error.invalid_channel_range: Fixture channels exceed the DMX universe
error.channel_overlap: Fixture channels overlap an existing fixture

node_options.title: Node Options
node_options.description: Configure default behavior for this DMX node.

add_fixture.title: Add Fixture
add_fixture.description: Add a fixture to this node and universe.

edit_fixture_details.title: Edit Fixture
edit_fixture_details.description: Update the selected fixture for this node and universe.

remove_fixture.title: Remove Fixture
remove_fixture.description: Remove a fixture from this node and universe.

abort.no_fixtures: No fixtures are configured for this node
